creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Andriy Gapon from comment #1)
> I am somewhat confused about kde4 <-> kf5 interoperability.
> Will the utility still work without issues for kde4 users?

Yes. I'm using it with a regular KDE4 desktop from the ports tree without any problems. It doesn't depend on the Plasma 5 desktop, just KF5 (think of kdelibs4 split up into many dozens of small libraries).
